command: echo '=== mt5.service journal ===' && journalctl -u mt5.service --since '3 min ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -20 && echo '=== mt5.service status ===' && systemctl status mt5.service --no-pager 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Try manual wine ===' && export DISPLAY=:99 WINEPREFIX=/root/.wine WINEDEBUG=-all STAGING_WRITECOPY=1 && /opt/wine-staging/bin/wine '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/terminal64.exe' 2>&1 & WPID=$! && sleep 15 && echo '=== Check ===' && ps aux | grep terminal64 | grep -v grep && echo '=== wine path ===' && which wine && ls -la /opt/wine-staging/bin/wine 2>/dev/null && ls -la /usr/bin/wine 2>/dev/null
